recommendations.title: An Adventure in Space and Time
recommendations.overview: Actor William Hartnell felt trapped by a succession of hard-man roles while wannabe producer Verity Lambert was frustrated by the TV industry's glass ceiling. Both of them were to find unlikely hope and unexpected challenges in the form of a Saturday

recommendations.title: Ready to Mingle
recommendations.overview: A wannabe bride seeks professional help to find a husband and in the process finds herself.

recommendations.title: Crimes and Misdemeanors
recommendations.overview: A renowned ophthalmologist is desperate to cut off an adulterous relationship…which ends up in murder; and a frustrated documentary filmmaker woos an attractive television producer while making a film about her insufferably self-centered boss.

recommendations.title: Radical
recommendations.overview: In a Mexican border town plagued by neglect, corruption, and violence, a frustrated teacher tries an unorthodox new method to break through his students’ apathy and unlock their curiosity, their potential... and perhaps even their genius.

recommendations.title: Big Nothing
recommendations.overview: A frustrated, unemployed teacher joins forces with a scammer and his girlfriend in a blackmailing scheme.

recommendations.title: Deep Cover
recommendations.overview: Kat is an improv comedy teacher beginning to question if she’s missed her shot at success. When an undercover cop offers her the role of a lifetime, she recruits two of her students to infiltrate London’s gangland by impersonating dangerous criminals

recommendations.title: Contempt
recommendations.overview: A philistine in the art film business, Jeremy Prokosch is a producer unhappy with the work of his director. Prokosch has hired Fritz Lang to direct an adaptation of "The Odyssey," but when it seems that the legendary filmmaker is making a picture des

recommendations.title: Friendzone
recommendations.overview: Hopeful romantic Thibault believes his luck could change when sparks fly between him and Rose. But can he go from bestie to boyfriend?

recommendations.title: Reality
recommendations.overview: A wanna-be director is given 48 hours by a producer to find the best groan of pain, worthy of an Oscar, as the only condition to back his film.

recommendations.title: Miller's Girl
recommendations.overview: A talented young writer embarks on a creative odyssey when her teacher assigns a project that entangles them both.
